subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of holiness which have been sent down in truth from the realm of exalted glory, that they may draw unto them such as have believed in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات القدس نزلت بالحق من جبروت عز علیا لتجذب الذینهم آمنوا بالله و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
